scripts.compose:web-test: docker compose --env-file .env.docker.web-test.example -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml -f infra/compose/docker-compose.prod.yml -f infra/compose/docker-compose.web-test.yml up -d --build
scripts.compose:down: docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml -f infra/compose/docker-compose.dev.yml -f infra/compose/docker-compose.prod.yml -f infra/compose/docker-compose.web-test.yml down -v
